changeSet.author: brahim
changeSet.comment: Migrate TaskStatus: READY_FOR_TEST → IN_REVIEW, NEEDS_INFO → NEW
changeSet.sql: UPDATE task SET status = 'IN_REVIEW' WHERE status = 'READY_FOR_TEST'; UPDATE task SET status = 'NEW' WHERE status = 'NEEDS_INFO';
UPDATE task SET status = 'IN_REVIEW' WHERE status = 'READY_FOR_TEST'; UPDATE task SET status = 'NEW' WHERE status = 'NEEDS_INFO';
